---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Hermes Agent UI
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve. What friction or limitation are you running into?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. How should it work from a user's perspective?

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches or workarounds you've already considered, and why they don't fully address the problem.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or references that would help us understand the request.
